title: codereview: driver does not report input events
description: lilygo_tdeck_keyboard.c only does I2C probe in init but does not set up polling thread, report keys via input_report_key/input_sync, or handle matrix scan for TCA8418-like chip. No actual keyboard functionality. P0 critical. Must fix before next review pass. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zonh.3
close_reason: Fixed driver with polling thread, key reporting via input_report_key/input_sync, matrix handling per TCA8418. Completed 3 codereview passes with no findings, Renode tests pass, builds clean.
